_doc: Animation transpositions of director-cinematographer visual DNA — ELEANOR-DAVID R3 / Studio style library
_scope: original animation directions; pipeline-realistic; homage + innovation beyond existing crossovers
research_anchors: Wes Anderson: Fantastic Mr. Fox, Isle of Dogs
Roger Deakins: Rango, WALL-E, How to Train Your Dragon consulting
Waltz with Bashir, Flee psychological doc-animation
Spider-Verse, The Red Turtle, Paprika, Sin City, Love Death & Robots

animation_styles.name: Procedural Underexposure Simulation CGI
animation_styles.technique: Hybrid 3D photoreal with heavy rotoscope base + custom procedural shaders
animation_styles.description: Frames rendered like security-cam / simulation footage with algorithmic keyframing enforcing obsessive repetition and mechanical dollies. Desaturated palette with bleach-bypass shaders crushing blacks; particle rain/reflections physically motivated but subtly glitch or decay in shadows. Selective gold/green emissives pierce darkness.
animation_styles.creative_innovation: Simulation meta-layer of cold calculation (Zodiac investigation files); subtle looping/decay in background for unresolved endings. Sin City meets Paprika psychological depth crossed with Love Death & Robots technical obsession — colder and more relentless.

animation_styles.name: Enforced Symmetry Multi-Plane Diorama Vector/Stop-Motion Hybrid
animation_styles.technique: Digital cut-out + physical miniature hybrid with AI symmetry locking + Ghibli-inspired parallax layers
animation_styles.description: Every frame rigidly centered/symmetrical with vibrant curated pastels, deep parallax planes, whip-pan simulation, tactile handmade textures (felt, paper, 3D-printed props) like a living pop-up book.
animation_styles.creative_innovation: Enforced digital symmetry beyond Anderson's own stop-motion; interactive chapter-book layers openable mid-film. Perfect alignment as thematic joke on control — wilder whimsy while obsessively balanced.

animation_styles.name: Caravaggio Shadow Opera Silhouette-Paint Hybrid
animation_styles.technique: Multi-layer cut-out silhouettes + hand-painted oil cel animation with dynamic volumetric light reveals
animation_styles.description: Figures emerge from deep blacks via selective top/side light shafts; warm earthy tones bleed through wax-like textures; faces half-hidden; epic widescreen fresco-like unfolding.
animation_styles.creative_innovation: Shadows act as silent family members that morph or consume figures. Lotte Reiniger elevated with Loving Vincent brushwork and Renaissance drama.

animation_styles.name: PBR Practical-Light Volumetric Hybrid
animation_styles.technique: Photoreal 3D CGI with strictly motivated simulated practical sources + scanned miniature textures; or Laika-style tactile stop-motion with real-world light rigs filmed
animation_styles.description: God rays through dust/haze; silhouettes against vast skies; negative space mastery; lens imperfections and film grain overlays; every light physically present.
animation_styles.creative_innovation: Deakins Lens Simulator renderer — animators treat light like a real DP on set in fantastical worlds. No Country desolation with animated environments that breathe as living locations.

animation_styles.name: Luminous Minimalist Ink-Wash Face Portrait Morph
animation_styles.technique: Hand-drawn 2D charcoal/ink-wash with soft gradient digital diffusion, extreme close-up focus, sparse symbolic overlays
animation_styles.description: Faces as hyper-expressive canvases lit by single-source window gradients; backgrounds dissolve to abstraction; subtle morphs reveal inner turmoil.
animation_styles.creative_innovation: Light as interrogator — soft glows slowly expose or hide truths on the face; micro-morphs for psychological depth. Waltz with Bashir lineage but softer, like a living etching.

animation_styles.name: Dynamic Goethe Color Symphony Oil Animation
animation_styles.technique: Frame-by-frame painterly like Loving Vincent with programmable color theory shifts and volumetric brushstroke physics
animation_styles.description: Palettes actively morph (reds flare in passion, blues isolate ideology); light sculpts figures like Caravaggio in motion; rich textured layers bleed and blend.
animation_styles.creative_innovation: Palettes conduct emotion like a score — scenes split or fuse hues to externalize inner conflict. Bertolucci sensual politics as visual opera more alive than paint-on-canvas.

animation_styles.name: Seamless Organic Long-Take Parallax Flow
animation_styles.technique: Hybrid 2D/3D multi-plane with continuous virtual Steadicam paths, Ghibli-inspired particle/natural element simulation, wide-angle distortion and available-light rendering
animation_styles.description: Unbroken flowing sequences; reactive environments; lens flares and chaos that feel handheld yet poetic.
animation_styles.creative_innovation: Breath-Take Animation — virtual camera breathes with the world; environments respond organically; documentary-like humanism in invented realities. Flee meets Spider-Verse fluidity crossed with The Red Turtle poetry — longer and more visceral.

hybrids.note: Source suggested Fincher+Deakins etc.; no combined spec captured
